steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
The total cost is \$60.00: the pass (\$24.00) plus 8 identical postcards. If $p$ is the cost of one postcard:
$$24.00 + 8p = 60.00$$

steps.title: Solve for the cost per postcard
steps.content: Subtract 24.00 from both sides: $$8p = 60.00 - 24.00 = 36.00$$ Divide both sides by 8: $$p = \frac{36.00}{8} = 4.50$$ B is correct.
